headline: There are still spaces left at our NYC pub quiz on 11 November. Did we mention the prizes?
body_text:
There’s just two weeks to go until the FT Alphaville Pub Quiz returns to Houston Hall, New York City on 11 November.

We still have space for a few more teams, so if the prospect of an evening of finance trivia isn’t enough, so we’ve come up with a little enticement — a prize reveal!

The winners on the night will be the first people to get their hands on FTAV’s brand-new ‘The Almighty Bond Cat’ T-shirt, which fuses pixel art, Ancient Egypt, mecha, the “giant cat on beach” meme and, naturally, fixed income. Here’s a crispy, low-res, LEAK-style preview of how it looks:

The victorious team will also of course secure the traditional winners’ mugs. Here’s how to get involved:

Email alphaville@ft.com with the subject line PQNYCNOV25.† Max team size is six, minimum is four. We’d ideally like teams of six to maximise attendance (and, possibly, your chances of victory), so get emailing your nerdiest friends.

For your entry to be complete, you must:— CC all team members— give the mobile numb
